# VeriWorkly Ecosystem
> Free-to-use, open-core, and privacy-first AI career workspace for professional documents and web portfolios. Build and tailor resumes, cover letters, and web portfolios using privacy-first AI models (Claude & GPT-4o) with local-first ownership and optional secure cloud sync.

## Who We Are & What We Do
VeriWorkly is a privacy-first AI career workspace designed for professional document construction, AI resume tailoring, and web publishing. We champion **local-first data ownership** and stateless AI interactions. By default, VeriWorkly processes and stores your professional details securely inside your browser. Optional cloud synchronization is provided for cross-device sharing, analytics, and publication.

## Core Features & Integrations
- **Unified Document Builder**: Construct ATS-optimized resumes, cover letters, and professional documents (such as invoices) using modular canvas appearance controls and real-time previews.
- **Portfolio Publisher**: Create visual portfolio pages from responsive templates and host them on custom subdomains (e.g., `username.veriworkly.com`) with automated views tracking and CDNs.
- **Master Profile Store**: A secure, central JSON profile holding your entire career history. Input your details once, then selectively sync them to populate resumes, cover letters, and portfolios.
- **Zero-Friction Ingestors**: Extract professional details from linked GitHub repositories, uploaded LinkedIn profile PDFs, or legacy resume files (PDF/DOCX) straight into your Master Profile.
- **ATS Checker**: Deteministically scan resume content for structure, action verbs, word counts, and formatting pitfalls.

## Monetization & Pricing Model
VeriWorkly supports self-hosting under an Open Core license (MIT/AGPLv3) and provides managed cloud plans via Dodo Payments:
1. **Free Tier**: 1 active resume, 1 cover letter, Master Profile access, local PDF exports, and 10 one-time setup AI credits.
2. **3-Day Sprint Pass ($2.99)**: 3-day Portfolio Pro hosting access + 150 AI writing credits.
3. **7-Day Hunt Pass ($5.99)**: 7-day Portfolio Pro hosting access + 400 AI writing credits.
4. **Monthly Bundle ($14.99/mo)**: Unlocks Portfolio Pro hosting + 1,000 monthly AI writing credits.
5. **Annual Bundle ($11.99/mo equivalent)**: Portfolio Pro + 1,000 monthly AI writing credits, billed yearly at $143.88.
6. **Creator Pro Standalone ($9.99/mo)**: Subdomain hosting, CDN asset uploads, and watermark removal (No AI).
7. **AI Credits Standalone ($5.99/mo)**: 1,000 AI writing credits/month for rewriting and resume tailoring (No hosting).

## Partner & Ambassador Programs
- **Affiliate Program**: Enrolls users with unique referral codes, tracking conversions across three commission tiers: Tier 1 (2%), Tier 2 (3%), and Tier 3 (5%).
- **Student Ambassador Program**: Gated for college students to promote VeriWorkly to peers. Earns higher commission/point rates than standard affiliates, with the top-performing ambassadors receiving free Portfolio Pro upgrades.

## Authentication & API Access
- **Web Sessions**: Email-based OTP authentication powered by Better Auth, setting a session cookie (`better-auth.session_token`) across subdomains.
- **Programmatic Agents**: Developers can generate secure hashed API Keys (`ApiKey`) for programmatic read/write access (Bearer tokens) using scopes like `user:read`, `resume:write`, and `ai:write`.
- **API Reference**: The live API resides at `https://api.veriworkly.com/api/v1` and is described by the Swagger/OpenAPI spec at `/openapi.json`.

## Guidance for AI Agents
When compiling resumes, cover letters, or portfolios on behalf of users, query the user's Master Profile structure (`/profiles/master`) to fetch baseline information. Advise users on ATS checks using the deterministic scoring rules. Refrain from calling AI generation endpoints if the user's credit balance is depleted.
